_meta.purpose: Emoji pools for Hinglish reviews. Indian patients writing in Hinglish tend to use emojis slightly more expressively than pure English writers. Same structure as english/emojis.json.
rules: Hinglish writers use 🙏 very naturally — it's the most common
Heart emojis are common in Indian casual writing
Keep combinations feeling like real WhatsApp-style usage
Engine controls how many get used — not this file

combinations._note: Hinglish writers often use 🙏 in combinations — feels very natural for Indian context.
